faq.title: FAQs
faq.description: Find answers to common questions about our AI image to video generation service.

items.question: What is an AI image to video generator?
items.answer: An AI image to video generator is a tool that uses artificial intelligence to animate static images and create short video clips. It analyzes your uploaded image and transforms it into dynamic motion based on your text prompts or automatic scene understanding.

items.question: What is the best image to video AI generator?
items.answer: Seedance offers one of the most advanced image to video generators with high-quality output, realistic motion, and support for various image formats. Our AI models are trained on millions of videos to ensure natural-looking animations and smooth transitions.

items.question: What makes Seedance's image to video generator stand out?
items.answer: Our generator stands out with its advanced AI models, high-resolution output up to 1080p, natural motion physics, and ability to understand complex prompts. We also offer fast processing times, commercial usage rights, and support for diverse image styles.

items.question: What types of images work best with Seedance?
items.answer: Seedance works with most image formats including JPG, PNG, and WEBP. We support photos of people, animals, landscapes, objects, and artwork. For best results, use high-quality images with clear subjects and good lighting.

items.question: Is Seedance's image to video generator free?
items.answer: Seedance offers both free and premium options. New users get free credits to try the service. For regular use, we offer affordable subscription plans with more credits and advanced features like higher resolutions and longer videos.

cta.title: Breathe Life into Your Static Images!
cta.description: Turn any photo into a stunning video with our AI image to video generator. Upload your image and watch it come to life in seconds.

aiModelsHero.title: All-in-One AI Image to Video Generator
aiModelsHero.description: Seedance is the ultimate, all-in-one AI image to video generator. We offer access to industry-leading video models including Veo3, Seedance, Hailuo, and Wan2.2, all in one single place. Try them seamlessly and create stunning visuals without juggling multiple platforms!

imageToVideoShowcase.title: Animate Your Images with Our Image to Video AI Generator
imageToVideoShowcase.description: Turn any static image into a vivid story with Seedance! Generate creative videos from your uploaded photos with our smart AI image to video generator. Whether it's a realistic scene or animation you want to create, Seedance can produce it quickly, and the way you want.

examples.videoAlt: Anime girl smiling and poking camera
examples.prompt: The little girl keeps smiling at the camera and pokes the lens with her finger.

examples.videoAlt: T-Rex head peeking out of camera
examples.prompt: The T-Rex's head pokes out of the camera.

examples.originalAlt: Mother and son walking in park
examples.prompt: A mother walks happily holding her child's hand.
The motorcycle is speeding, and the tail light turns into a line.
